chapters.description: Create a Checkout Session in setup mode to collect payment details.

nodes.description: Create a customer to attach the saved payment method to.
nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.
nodes.review_risk: A wrong API call or stale Stripe ID can make later steps work against the wrong resource.

nodes.description: Create a Checkout Session with mode=setup to save a payment method.
nodes.title: Create a Checkout Session (setup mode)
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.
nodes.review_risk: A wrong API call or stale Stripe ID can make later steps work against the wrong resource.

chapters.title: Create a Setup Session

chapters.description: Redirect the customer and handle the result.

nodes.description: Redirect the customer to the Checkout Session URL.
nodes.title: Redirect to setup page
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.
nodes.review_risk: A UI mismatch can make a working backend unreachable or send users through the wrong flow.

nodes.description: Listen for the setup_intent.succeeded event to confirm the payment method was saved.
nodes.title: Handle setup_intent.succeeded
nodes.review_prompt: Run stripe trigger setup_intent.succeeded and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.
nodes.review_risk: Webhook mistakes can fulfill work from spoofed or unhandled events.

chapters.title: Complete the setup
